INT. MOTEL ROOM - DAY #11#

He is alone in a cheap room. Early morning light seeping through the blinds. Two single beds: the one he's in and the other hosting an open suitcase.

verbatim_instructions: JRM as Ben shaving in motel bathroom mirror. Heavier under eyes, no moustache, unclean mirror with smudges, hard side-light, eye level. Not telephoto enough — more compressed and tighter, desaturated. v5.
curated_description: Scene #12 — Motel Bathroom. Extremely tight telephoto close-up of Jonathan Rhys Meyers as Ben shaving in a motel bathroom mirror. Shot from far away with a very long telephoto lens creating strong compression — face fills the frame with shallow depth of field. Heavy bags under eyes, dark circles, no moustache. Unclean mirror with smudges. Hard dramatic side-light casting deep shadows across gaunt features. Camera at eye level. Loosely buttoned shirt, no tattoos visible. Highly desaturated almost-monochrome cool palette. Grimy bathroom tiles. Iterated through v1→v5 (composition, lens, desaturation, JRM face).

fountain_text:
EXT. MOTEL - DAY #14#

Ben locks his door and carries the trash bag with him.

The motel is next to an outdoor pool, which sits covered in autumn leaves. He passes a NEIGHBOR, who is parked outside his room on a deck chair.

Ben dumps the bottles in the dumpster.

verbatim_instructions: Telephoto close-up — JRM as Ben driving F-250, autumn trees reflected in windshield. No tattoos visible.
curated_description: Scene #15 — Pickup Drive. Telephoto close-up of Jonathan Rhys Meyers as Ben driving his Ford F-250 pickup. Shot from a distance with a long lens for compressed perspective. Gaunt, post-divorce, hollow-cheeked. Autumn trees and overcast sky reflected in the windshield. No tattoos visible (long sleeves, hands on wheel). Heading toward Broken Bow. Desaturated cool palette. Scope 2.39:1.
fountain_text:
INT. PICKUP (MOVING) - NEW YORK STATE - DAY #15#

Ben drives. He turns on the radio.

Music. It cuts in and out. He cranks the dial... tries to fix it. No good, the sound keeps going in and out.

He kills it and drives silently.

verbatim_instructions: Make the shot much wider and more elevated. Car park should be busier. He should be wearing jeans. v3.
curated_description: Scene #16 — Municipal Courthouse Exterior. Wide elevated establishing shot of a grey municipal courthouse with glass doors, viewed from high above the carpark. A battered Ford F-250 pickup is parked in the foreground left. Jonathan Rhys Meyers as a gaunt man in a suit jacket and jeans walks up the steps toward the glass entrance, his back to the camera. Several people and cars fill the carpark and walkways below. Autumn leaves scattered everywhere. Overcast morning light. Desaturated cool palette. EXT. MUNICIPAL COURT BUILDING - DAY #16#

Ben moves up the steps. His gait is heavy and slow. He pushes through glass doors.

MARIE'S LAWYER (O.S.)
It is her intention to refinance and remove his name from the chain.
